required_preferences.fact: Now purchases lunch on campus most weekdays due to increased grading workload and larger class sizes, prepping only occasional meals at home

supersedes.fact: Preps lunch for the week on Sundays — never buys cafeteria food during the semester

required_preferences.fact: Now visits parents two to three times per week, flexibly accommodating their increased needs for help with household tasks and medical appointments; Sunday visits are no longer fixed, but scheduled as needed.

supersedes.fact: Visits parents every Sunday afternoon for errands — never misses unless out of town

required_preferences.fact: Prefers written communication for work relationships — rarely makes phone calls to colleagues
Prepares detailed presentation scripts and slide decks for conferences, preferring to deliver rehearsed and polished talks rather than improvising.
Monitors hydration closely and drinks lemon water throughout teaching days — never chooses caffeinated sodas
Books pet-sitting or cat drop-in services for any overnight academic travel to ensure peace of mind during conferences.

persona: A community college instructor teaching academic writing skills
